characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: Arthuris a recurring character and a student atPacific Coast Academy. He is a friend ofFirewire, who first appeared in the season 3 episode,Favor Chain. He replaced Andrew after season 2 and is played byRyan James Nelson. In the episode,Favor Chain, he is shown to be part of the PCA Comic Book Club (along withFirewireandNeil). Upon learning that Chase Matthews, has a long history of expertise in knowledge of comic book trivia, him and the rest of the comic club choose to appoint Chase as their leader. He returned inChasing Zoey, with his friends, going to the prom without dates.

characters.name: Brooke Margolin
characters.description: Brooke Margolinwas a minor character appearing inSeason 4ofZoey 101. She datedMark Del FiggaloinQuinn Misses the Mark. Brooke also appeared inChasing Zoey, the episode in which her relationship with Mark seems to have ended. She is played byMariah Buzolin. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: CarlisCoco Wexler's boyfriend. As revealed inHot Dean, he dumps her over the phone every three weeks due to his softball team losing.Coco's Cousin, Carl, and Dean Taylor are her hang-arounds. Coco mentions that she does not always get along with Carl. Carl is usually not so nice sometimes. He and Coco got into several fights in the past. He is also mentally unstable, at times, just like Coco. He stated this himself inHot Dean. He’s really strong. He carried Coco in the same episode.﻿ However, even he could barely carry Coco several miles. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it. Carl is usually not so nice sometimes. He and Coco got into several fights in the past. He is also mentally unstable, at times, just like Coco. He stated this himself inHot Dean. He’s really strong. He carried Coco in the same episode.﻿ However, even he could barely carry Coco several miles.

characters.name: Carmine
characters.description: Carmineis a character who appeared inWalk-A-Thon. He is portrayed byJerry Kernion. He started the Walk-A-Thon and talks to Zoey Brooks about it. She explain the problem to him and discovers that he is extremely fierce. When Zoey and Dustin hear this, he started to glare, causing them to run. It is unknown what happened to Carmine as he never seen again. Furthermore, it was likely banned from PCA after the episode. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Chase Matthews
characters.description: Chase is known to be sweet natured, awkward, kind, honest and charming. He's a lovable guy with the heart of gold and the knack of getting himself into harm's way. His kind heart, quick wit, and great social skills, however, made him well liked in his school and he was always quick to help those in need. It's also been demonstrated (and stated by Lola) that Chase is quite gullible. A hopeless klutz, he was always falling, tripping or hurling over something and was known for his awful dancing untilDance Contest. He's also been known to be incredibly neurotic and have bouts of anxiety throughout the show, mostly having to do with his feelings for Zoey.

characters.name: Chauncy
characters.description: Chauncyis the butler that works atLogan's dad's house. Despite his manner, he can be shown to be a bit strict. He also has a knack for identifying whether or not a coin is real. He apparently wasn't a big fan of technology. InSpring Break-Up, Chauncy was to serve everyone at what they wanted when they were at Logan's dad's house. InLogan Gets Cut Off, Chauncy gave the value of the coin that Logan bought fromFirewire. Chauncy also came to cut Logan's credit card in half. He was also seen doing Malcolm Reese's hair.

characters.name: Chuck Javers
characters.description: Chuck Javersis a minor character and the main antagonist of theSeason 3episodeWrestling. He is a competitive and aggressive wrestler known for his hostile nature, often challenging others to matches without hesitation. He entered in a wrestling tournament, winning all of his matches, his last opponent beingZoey Brooks. Later, he was confronted by Logan for being so hard on Zoey. However, Chuck lost it and probably either slammed him to the ground or kicked him in the stomach. He is portrayed by Danny Bates. Chuck is shown to be very bold, vicious, dangerous, and brash. He cares almost solely about his reputation, along with winning the wresting tournament in which he, Zoey, and several other high school students pose competition. Faux affable to the letter, he shows very superficial respect to his opponents, only asking Zoey if she’s ready for it and slapping her hand instead of giving her a handshake, insisting on getting on with their match. He appears to be very insensitive and arrogant, and when he faced Zoey in his match with her, he treated her no differently than any of his other opponents, despite Zoey being a girl. It is shown in a video of one of PCA's old wrestling tournaments that he attacked the cameraman for filming him while he was wrestling.  He also spat his gum on Michael's face, took Chase's Blix without permission, and even broke Quinn's glasses, although she luckily had a spare pair on hand. After that episode, he was never seen, heard, or mentioned ever again.

characters.name: Coco Wexler
characters.description: Coco Wexleris the girls' dorm advisor. She is a troubled and complicated individual. She has changed considerably through the later seasons, gaining weight and becoming somewhat emotionally unstable. InHot Dean, she has revealed that she hasn't had the best background. She mentions that she went to a "rat-hole" of a high school as a teenager. The school was in very poor conditions, as she says that they had large roaches in the cafeteria. Coco has a very strange personality. She is fascinated with ravioli, to the point where she would not drop ravioli when she was chased by bees in Season 3. She was fired from her job for putting a lion in Dean Rivers' office when trying to make him happy, but was hired back after her replacement, Mira, was found to be a kleptomaniac, when she stole all the girls' belongings. Coco got a job at a restaurant as the ladies' restroom attendant. When Zoey came to see how it was, Coco told Zoey to kill her with a hammer (expressing her hatred for the job).

characters.name: Coco's cousin
characters.description: Coco's CousinisCoco's dwarf cousin. He appears in the episodesRoller CoasterandPaige at PCA. He is a manager or worker atMystic Mountain. InPaige at PCA,ChaseandLoganget fed up withMichaelconstantly ditching them when they need to finish their project. They decide to play a trick on Michael by making him think he's going crazy. To achieve this, they hire Coco's cousin. Coco's cousin wears a white wedding dress with ruby red slippers and plays a banjo as Michael walks by and says he was taking a fish for a walk. He also appears in a picture with Michael and a big fish that Michael can't remember being taken because it is part of the trick Logan and Chase played on him. InRoller Coaster, he is working at theSpine Twisterand asks Michael if he remembered the incident. Michael doesn't want to talk about it because he is kind of embarrassed that happened. Ultimately, Zoey arranges with Coco's cousin for Michael to ride on Mystic Mountain to get over his fear of roller coasters.

characters.name: Courtney
characters.description: Courtney Courtneywas seen in the Season 1 episode,Quinn's Date. She wasMark's girlfriend but broke up with him when she caught him out withQuinn, even though Mark didn't know he was on a date with her. Mark, Chase, and Zoey tried to explain that he was hanging out with Chase insetad, but Courtney didn't buy it and abruptly ended her relationship with Mark, and hits him in the stomach with his salami. Courtney was portrayed by Zoe Keller. Courtney is later shown in a flashback in the episode/series finale,PCA Confidential.

characters.name: Courtney

characters.name: Dana Cruz
characters.description: PCA Confidential(flashbacks only) Dana Cruz(Kristin Herrera) was one of the main characters in theNickelodeonTV seriesZoey 101. She was the roommate and friend ofZoey BrooksandNicole Bristowin Season 1. Her other good friends areMichael BarretandChase Matthews. Dana enjoys playing basketball along with her best friendZoey. She is one of the first girls on thePCABasketball Team. She also enjoys riding skateboards. Dana owns a purple Jet X and usually sleeps on the bottom bunk in her dorm room. Although Dana doesn't get along with her friends most of the time, she is quite a good friend and sticks beside them when they are in trouble. Dana was only a main character in Season 1.  As stated in Season 2, she was accepted to a European Exchange Student Program to study in Paris, withLola Martineztaking her spot inRoom 101. Dana with Zoey and Nicole in season 1 Dana is one of Zoey's season one roommates. Dana is good at sports, particularly basketball. In some episodes it was seen that she also likes to skateboard. She also loves to sleep, hates to wake up, and considers mankind's greatest invention to be the snooze button on her alarm clock. She frequently argued with roommateNicole Bristow, whom Dana blamed for giving her frequent nightmares about "death by blow dryer." Dana's bad attitude is comparable to that ofLogan Reese, whom she cannot stand, although both have quite a bit in common and went to a school dance together. Dana has a strong-willed personality and will often try to do things on her own, which is shown inJet X, but finds she succeeds more in a group. She tends to be sometimes tomboyish, aggressive, and negative. Dana has two arguments throughout the series withZoey Brooks, one inNew Roomiesand another inJet X. She is a snob, but she can be sweet at times. Dana is devious and really knows how to mess with Logan.

characters.name: Danifer
characters.description: DaniferwasStacey Dillsen's boyfriend who only appeared in the Season 3 episode,Quarantine. Danifer is played byAustin Butler. Danifer was dating Stacey untilDustintold him thatZoey Brookshad to reschedule his date with her. However, Dustin confused Danifer with an entirely different Danny. This caused Stacey to think that he was cheating on her. Out of anger, she poured coffee down his shirt, broke up with him, and ran away screaming. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Danny
characters.description: Dannywas a one-time character inZoey 101. He asked Zoey Brooks out on a date during the episode,Quarantine. He is portrayed byCody Dorkin. When Lola Martinez was screaming in attempts to practice her part for an audition, Danny comes running to her rescue upon hearing the scream. He finds Zoey and Lola together and learned that they were not in danger. He than asked Zoey out on a date to the movies later that night for 7:00PM. Zoey excitedly agreed. Zoey and her friends unfortunately get quarantined in their dorm room, due to Quinn accidentally leaking a chemical germ. This caused Zoey to miss her date with Danny. She called Dustin and asked him to find Danny at the movie theatre and explain why she can't make it. However, Dustin mistook another boy named,Danifer, for Danny. This resulted in Danny believing that Zoey stood him up.

characters.name: David Bender
characters.description: David H. Benderis the school's film and tech teacher. David Bender was also a formerPCAstudent and a member of the Cheerleading squad. He was a favorite throughoutSeason 1. In one episode, he helped the group go back to PCA after they got to a wrong beach. He made 3 appearances inSeason 2. InChasing Zoey, his name was announced over the loudspeaker at the prom. It was also mentioned in the episodeFavor Chainthat Lola was babysitting his son for him while he and his wife were out. David is very nice toward the kids and always helps them out when they're in trouble. He is one of the nicest and most generous teachers at Pacific Coast Academy. InLittle Beach Party, he drove all the way to a deserted beach to pick the kids up. He can resemble a student himself, however, considering in one episode, his zipper was down. In another episode, he showedZoeyandChasehis two-way visual phone, which then showed his wife saying, "David, you left your underwear on the floor again!" David is very nice toward the kids and always helps them out when they're in trouble. He is one of the nicest and most generous teachers at Pacific Coast Academy. characters.name: Dean Rivers
characters.description: Charles "Carl" Rivers(Christopher Murray), also known as Dean Rivers, is the Dean ofPacific Coast Academy. He is married and spends a lot of money on video games. He can be very stubborn and unsupportive at times. He andZoeyoften have different ideas on things, like vending machines. His full name, as shown inSpring Fling, was "Charles W. Rivers" on a sign next to Dana that is seen after the girls ask Dean Rivers about putting up a fund-raiser. However, inQuinn's Alpaca, his wife called him Carl (although that could just be his nickname, as Carl is short for Charles). He likes lions but was attacked by one inFake Roommate. He's also a former student at PCA (back when it was still a boys-only school) and was on the boys' golf team in high school, during which he won the PCA golf tournament during his senior year. InZoey 102, it is revealed that he was stealing the students' tuition to go and gamble it. He and his wife have at least three children: a son namedLance Rivers(who briefly dated Zoey) and two unnamed daughters, one of whom is apparently married, because Dean Rivers mentioned inThe Great Vince Blakethat he has an unnamed son-in-law who got him a miniature-sized pool table for his office.

characters.name: Dustin Brooks
characters.description: Dustin Brooks(born February 16th, 1994) is a character and one of the main characters in the Nickelodeon TV series,Zoey 101. It was revealed years later inZoey 102that he has two children and a set of twins on the way. He is portrayed byPaul Butcher. Dustin Brooks isZoey Brooks' younger brother. He's the type of person that's always there for everyone, especially his sister, Zoey. He is also known to be a bit shy. Besides being his fiercest protector and closest confidante, Zoey has more recently become her brother's classmate at the newly coed PCA.A child prodigy, Dustin enjoys sharing an 8th grade geometry class with his equally savvy elder sister. He also enjoys helpingQuinn Penskywith her scientific experiments, when he is not talking his way in and out of assorted sticky situations. Whenever he gets in over his head, Zoey is always the first one to rush to her kid brother's aid. Although her playing 'bodyguard' gets on Dustin's nerves from time to time, he loves Zoey too much to hold that against her. BySeason 3, not only is Dustin friends with all of the main characters, but he also spends much time socializing with kids his own age, though he admits that he misses the days where it was just him and Zoey. When Zoey and his parents move to London, he stays at PCA. InSeason 4, however, he started to become a little more rude, likely due to puberty, such as in the movieChasing Zoey, when he made fun of Quinn about her falling off his bike. Despite this, he is still maintaining his kind persona and is always willing to help out.

characters.name: Dustin Brooks
characters.description: Dustin Brooks(born February 16th, 1994) is a character and one of the main characters in the Nickelodeon TV series,Zoey 101. It was revealed years later inZoey 102that he has two children and a set of twins on the way. He is portrayed byPaul Butcher. Dustin Brooks isZoey Brooks' younger brother. He's the type of person that's always there for everyone, especially his sister, Zoey. He is also known to be a bit shy. Besides being his fiercest protector and closest confidante, Zoey has more recently become her brother's classmate at the newly coed PCA.A child prodigy, Dustin enjoys sharing an 8th grade geometry class with his equally savvy elder sister. He also enjoys helpingQuinn Penskywith her scientific experiments, when he is not talking his way in and out of assorted sticky situations. Whenever he gets in over his head, Zoey is always the first one to rush to her kid brother's aid. Although her playing 'bodyguard' gets on Dustin's nerves from time to time, he loves Zoey too much to hold that against her. BySeason 3, not only is Dustin friends with all of the main characters, but he also spends much time socializing with kids his own age, though he admits that he misses the days where it was just him and Zoey. When Zoey and his parents move to London, he stays at PCA. InSeason 4, however, he started to become a little more rude, likely due to puberty, such as in the movieChasing Zoey, when he made fun of Quinn about her falling off his bike. Despite this, he is still maintaining his kind persona and is always willing to help out.

characters.name: Elvis
characters.description: Elvisis Chase and Michael's dog from Season 1 episodesDefending Dustin&Quinn's Date. InDefending Dustin, Chase and Michael leave him with Dana, Nicole and Zoey. However, he escapes when Nicole opens the door, which allows Coco to take him and send him to the animal shelter. Dana takes a bus to rescue him, much to her friends' excitement. She then warns them that Coco is approaching, so Nicole and Zoey tell him to hide, allowing him to stay. They continue playing with him after Coco leaves. InQuinn's Date, Chase and Michael leave Elvis with Dustin because they have to study all week and Logan is off surfing. Whenever he tries to get near Elvis, he barks, sending Dustin running away while screaming.

characters.name: Farfalla Biallo
characters.description: Farfalla Bialloappeared in the episodeSchool Dance. She isOllie Biallo's sister. Ollie said he had to go pray to the moon, so Michael had to entertain Farfalla, much to his pleasure. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. characters.description: Faye Dobsonis the owner of the horse who foundMichael Barret,Windchester. She only appears inQuinn Misses the Mark. Faye's husband forgot to close the gate and Windchester escaped. Faye was reunited with Windchester and was so glad to see him. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Firewire
characters.description: Wayne "Firewire" Gilbertis a recurring character inZoey 101. He has appeared in various episodes and is portrayed as a science nerd, a comic book nerd, and a tech geek. He is sometimes rude, especially to girls who are smart. He hates it when people call him by his real name. Firewire was played byAllen Evangelista. Firewire, as his personal nickname suggests, is a science buff and has a passion for computers and technology. He spends his time creating and working with various technological things, he is sometimes mean to students who are not smart, and his debut in the series shows him along with his friends designing a robot. Because of his technological prowess, Firewire is rather arrogant about it and insults others who are not on par with his intelligence level. He and his friends also have a big interest in comic books, including comic books about Superman and Spiderman.

characters.name: Gene
characters.description: Geneis a minor character appearing in the Season 3 episodeDance Contest. He is a friend ofLola's and one of the best dancers at PCA. In Dance Contest, Lola pairs him up withZoey Brooksfor the dance contest, but he gets injured, causing Zoey to have to withdraw. Gene is portrayed byKelly Blatz. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Glen Davis
characters.description: Glen Daviswas Zoey's dance partner and the main antagonist in the episodeSchool Dance. There was a tie in the personality tests, causing Chase and Glen both to get matched up with Zoey. But this was a problem for Chase because he wanted to go to the dance with Zoey because he likes her. Zoey picked Glen because the whole theme of the dance was to meet new people, and she and Chase are already friends. Glen and Chase didn't get along because both of them got paired up withZoey. They both wanted Zoey to go to the dance with them. Although it can be assumed that Glen and Chase remained enemies, they were never seen interacting after the dance. Glen was Zoey's dance partner. But Zoey was disappointed when Glen tricked her into being his partner when he stole the same answers from Zoey's personality test.

characters.name: Greg
characters.description: Gregis a boy that Lisa Perkins used to date, before Michael saved her when Chase's go-kart went out of control. They ended up singing together in Open Mic. Night and became a couple. He is portrayed byStephen Lunsfordand only appeared inMichael Loves Lisa. Greg met Zoey at yoga class. They got along, but didn't talk much. Greg and Lisa became a couple. Michael wasn't too happy that Lisa was dating him because Michael had a crush on her. When Chase's go-kart almost ran into her, Michael saved her. They ended up kissing & singing together at Open Mic. Night. After that, they became boyfriend & girlfriend.

characters.name: Gretchen
characters.description: Gretchenis a minor character appearing inSeason 3ofZoey 101.Chase Matthewsbefriended and introduced her to the group, afterZoey Brooksmoved to England. She is portrayed byMadison Riley. AfterZoeymoves to England to attendCovington Preparatory SchoolinGoodbye Zoey,Chase, feeling guilty over how a lack of communication on his part was a factor in Zoey leaving, befriended Gretchen, whom he shared a class with, to fill the void. Gretchen joins the gang for their usual volleyball game, proving a terrible participant, after whichQuinnexplains toLolathat Chase only tolerates Gretchen because of how much she looks like Zoey. She later joins them for a lunch, disgusting the girls, along withMichaelandLogan, by randomly taking a bite out of Quinn's apple and then sticking her gum on the apple. Despite the similar appearances, Gretchen is Zoey's exact opposite. Quinn summarized her as "nauseating" much to Lola's approval. While Zoey is proper, Gretchen is seen doing various disgusting things, including digging in her nose, scratching her armpits, spitting, and popping her zits at lunch. Where Zoey is polite and considerate, Gretchen is rude such as randomly taking a bite out of Quinn's apple, grossing out Lola, Quinn, Michael, and Logan. In contrast to Zoey's independence, Gretchen seems rather passive, going along with whatever Chase desires and taking no part in the gang's volleyball game.

characters.name: Herman
characters.description: HermanisQuinn Pensky's pet tarantula. He appears in theSeason 3episode,Quarantine. He is seen crawling on Lola's bed, causing her to scream. Quinn, thinking Lola overreacted, picked Herman up and comforted him. All of Quinn's friends screamed in shock, and Quinn told them to not do that, as it'll scare Herman, as she comforted him some more. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. You can help the Zoey 101 Wiki byadding to it.

characters.name: Jack
characters.description: Jackis the roommate and best friend ofDustin Brooks. He appeared as a recurring character throughout the first three seasons ofZoey 101. His first appearance was in the pilot episode,Welcome to PCA. He was portrayed byDarren Victoria. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. characters.name: James and Candice
characters.description: James and Candicewere a couple seen in theSeason 1episode,Quinn's Date.Quinnwanted to videotape them kissing to learn about the interaction between a romantic couple, but they were creeped out by her. James is portrayed by Josh Uhler and Candice is portrayed by Ashley Benson. This article is considered astubbecause it is lacking information and is thereby short. characters.name: James Garrett
characters.description: James Xavier Garrett(Austin Butler) one of the main characters featured in Season 4 of the Nickelodeon TV series,Zoey 101. He is the roommate ofLogan ReeseandMichael Barret. His other friends areZoey Brooks,Quinn Pensky,Vince Blake,Dustin BrooksandLola Martinez. James is from Santa Fe, New Mexico. He first joins PCA and interacts with the gang inRumor of Love. He replaces Chase as Michael and Logan's new roommate, much to their dismay. They make it very clear that they don't want him there, and he eventually gets the point and leaves. There was also a rumor going on that him and Zoey were dating, which was started by Logan to try to get rid of Logan as "competition" for girls. Michael then comes to James' new bedroom and apologizes, inviting him back to live with them. Later, they get Logan to admit that the rumor he spread about James and Zoey was untrue and helps the girls get back at Logan. He also hates Michael's Clackers. Later, James and Zoey, after finally getting rid of the rumor of their relationship, kiss and become a couple. James and Zoey continue their relationship fromAnger Managementuntil part 1 ofChasing Zoey, the series finale. In Chasing Zoey, James gifts Zoey a locket with an inscription on it saying, "I love you", but Zoey realizes that she is unable to reciprocate his feelings. James understands, and they break up, but decide to remain friends. James isn't seen again after he kisses Zoey goodbye on the cheek. James made a total presence in 9 episodes out of 65 total throughout the series. He was not introduced until the Season 4 Rumor of Love, being absent inTrading Places,Fake Roommate,Alone at PCA, and Part 2 of Chasing Zoey. He is also one of only two main characters who was never present in every episode of a full season, the other beingDustin Brooks. LikeDana Cruz, James is only in the main character group for one season. Part 1 of Chasing Zoey is the onlyZoey 101TV movie James appears in. He appears in the fewest number of episodes of any main character on the series. James is from Santa Fe, New Mexico. He first joins PCA and interacts with the gang inRumor of Love.
